data.summary: Insufficient evidence to validate the requirement for migration tools for optional bulk remap.
data.assessment: The exploratory step requires validation of the requirement for migration tools for optional bulk remap. However, the evidence provided does not include any specific implementation details or API responses that confirm this requirement is satisfied. The linked use case discusses the retirement of a status but lacks concrete evidence of how migration tools are implemented or utilized, leading to an inconclusive verdict.
gaps: No evidence of migration tools for optional bulk remap.

deterministicFollowUps.title: Add deterministic evidence contract
deterministicFollowUps.assertion: Define concrete endpoint calls and assertions that directly verify this requirement.
